criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The average amount of time users spend on the app and the frequency of their interactions.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store analytics, in-app usage data

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent and effectiveness of AI features integrated into the app, such as chatbots, recommendation engines, and natural language processing.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, and technical documentation

criteria.name: User Reviews and Ratings
criteria.description: The average rating and the sentiment of user reviews on app stores.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store reviews

criteria.name: Downloads and Popularity
criteria.description: The total number of downloads and the app's ranking in the social networking category.
criteria.sources: App Store and Google Play Store statistics

criteria.name: Innovation and Uniqueness
criteria.description: The originality and uniqueness of the app's features and user experience compared to other social networking apps.
criteria.sources: Expert reviews, industry analyses, and app descriptions
